text: The product interface has evolved a lot during the product’s lifetime. From a very contrasted black sidebar + white content interface into a minimalistic UI with a soothing sandy color palette.
In the early days of Hyperline, we decided to build lead magnets to bring new prospects to our website and increase our brand awareness in the very crowded billing space.
This is a very good design that I wish I did myself ; no need to be too crazy about it it’s cool and that’s it.

For the past 3 years, I’ve been working as the founding designer of Hyperline, the next-gen revenue management platform for SaaS companies. I’m in charge product, design and brand identity.
